'''Soy Beans''' is a soy-related crafting material.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Soy beans.png
| id = soy_beans
| type = Farming
| Subtype = Soy
| stackable = 64
}}

== Obtaining ==

=== Killing Hostile Mobs ===

* The item has a random chance of dropping from certain hostile mobs (Zombies, Skeletons, Spiders, Creepers,...) when a [[Getting Started|trained]] dog deals the final blow.

=== Farming ===

* It'll drop from Soy Crops when harvested.
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' [[Soy Pods]] to obtain Soy Beans.

== Used in ==

* [[Dried Soy Beans]]
* [[Miso Paste]] 
* [[Natto]]

== Usage ==

* '''<code>Right click</code>''' on [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Farmland Farmland] to plant Soy Crops.

== Trivia ==

* It was added in DTN 1.18.0
* The '''soybean''', '''soy bean''', or '''soya bean''' ('''''Glycine max''''') is a species of legume native to East Asia, widely grown for its edible bean, which has numerous uses.<ref>[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Soybean Soybean - Wikipedia]</ref>
